response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of full-stack engineering across a wide range of domains and stacks, with solid TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud/containerization experience directly matching the primary requirements. His current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks — a rare and high-value match for this role. The main gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS and Vitest experience, and while Java appears in earlier roles, Kotlin is not mentioned; these are learnable gaps for someone with his depth, but they introduce onboarding risk for a team expecting fluency from day one.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience in current role, matching the increasingly strategic AI tooling requirement
Long full-stack career (10+ years) spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes — covers most of the required stack
Demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored D-language testing libraries, organized Code Kata and Refactoring Dojo sessions
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework for this role
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are absent from the resume; testing framework depth with the specified tools is unverified
Kotlin is not referenced; Java appears only in early/peripheral roles, leaving the secondary backend stack requirement largely unconfirmed
